source: Isle of Man Government open data - Social Security Benefits claims & expenditure

notes.claims: Number of claims in payment at end of financial year (31 March); lump-sum payments counted during the year.
notes.expenditure: Expenditure in year to 31 March, in GBP thousands. funding_source e.g. NIF = National Insurance Fund.

claims.benefit: Manx State Pension (up to full rate)
Free TV licence for over 75s (see note 15)
Bereavement Suppport Payment lump-sum payment (see note 189

expenditure.benefit: Manx state pension - up to full rate
